pi_items.source: Verified against the real USGS QuakeML base data file (noto_earthquake.xml) showing an origin time of 2024-01-01T07:10:09.476Z, and the programmatic injection of the duplicate event at 2024-01-01T07:10:15.0000Z in setup_task.sh.
Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly configures and executes 'launch_seiscomp_gui scolv', as well as the task description requiring the Origin Locator View.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real seismic event data for the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake sourced from USGS FDSN Web Services, featuring a genuine origin time of 2024-01-01T07:10:09.476Z. To create the duplication scenario, a synthetic counterpart event is programmatically injected via setup_task.sh at 2024-01-01T07:10:15.0000Z. The correct SeisComP application to consolidate these events is 'scolv' (Origin Locator View), matching the GUI spawned by the environment initialization scripts.
